title: taraxacum ferum
intro: Taraxacum ferum, also known as the dandelion, is a flowering plant in the sunflower family that grows widely in lawns, meadows, and along roadsides. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include acting as a diuretic, digestive aid, and anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Taraxacum ferum include reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and supporting liver function. Taraxacum ferum can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as tea, tincture, and capsules, making it easily accessible for those looking to harness its medicinal properties.
